name: objectives contains emoji, combining marks, and RTL text
description: Verifies JCS implementations handle non-ASCII without normalization. The plan objectives field contains an emoji (🚀), a combining mark (é = U+0065 U+0301, not the precomposed U+00E9), and RTL Hebrew text.
